title: helenium microcephalum
intro: Helenium microcephalum, also known as the narrow-leaved sneezeweed, is a flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium microcephalum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as colds and allergies, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Helenium microcephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
